inquiries.query:
/*Practice Problem 2
? Question:

1.Look for non-senior data analyst or business analyst roles
	Only get job titles that include either 'Data' or 'Business'
	Also include those with 'Analyst' in any part of the title
	Don't include any job titles with 'Senior' followed by any character
2.Get the job title, location, and average yearly salary*/

SELECT
	job_id,
    job_title,
    job_location,
    job_via,
    salary_year_avg
FROM
	job_postings_fact
WHERE
	(job_title LIKE '%Data%' OR job_title LIKE '%Business%') AND
	(job_title LIKE '%Analyst%') AND (job_title NOT LIKE '%Senior%')
inquiries.name: 23_02_26_Practice2
